rule CDB_May_2026_Patch_Tuesday_30_Critical_Vulne {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for May 2026 Patch Tuesday: 30 Critical Vulnerabilities Among 130 CVEs"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE20260257_Rapid7_Caught_Attackers_Abus {

        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-31"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-0257" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 35 threat advisories. Of these, 0 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 17 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
